name: Ben 10: Heroic Crossover (MHA and Ben 10 RPG)
description:
🟢 Ben 10 x My Hero Academia Crossover RPG 🦸

A green watch. A world of Quirks. An open-ended adventure where your choices shape the story.

Ben Tennyson is stranded in the MHA universe, his Omnitrix reacting unpredictably to Quirks. Rumors spread — some see a hero, others a threat. Now, you step into this world.

🔹 Play as anyone: a U.A. student, a Pro Hero, a villain, a vigilante, a civilian, or something entirely original.

🔹 Your backstory, your Quirk (or lack of one), your path.

🔹 A living world with deep lore, NPCs, and crossover mysteries.

Just tell the Narrator who you are and where you begin, and the story starts from there.
creator: shadow1855
